scripts.bootstrap: npm run bootstrap:agent && npm run bootstrap:ui && npm run bootstrap:cli
scripts.build: npm run build:agent && npm run build:contract && npm run build:ui && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:contract: cd contract && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/silo_contract.wasm ../agent/src/lib/silo_contract.wasm
scripts.test: npm run test:contract && npm run test:agent && npm run test:ui && npm run test:cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:ui && npm run typecheck:agent
scripts.typecheck:agent: cd agent && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../cli && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.audit: npm run audit:ui && npm run audit:agent
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run e2e
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci && npm run build && npm run e2e
